prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热 度偏热至高热推荐，与太原理工大学工科定位契合；新疆2025年理科考生约52538人，2026年总考生约238000人，按2025年理科占比约68.6%估算，2026年理科考生约163268人，较 2025年大幅增长约2.1倍，竞争显著加剧；太原理工大学位于山西省太原市，在新疆属于跨省招生，无本地生源倾斜；该校在新 疆理科招生规模较小（10-12人），招生人数波动对位次影响较为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年计划扩招20%带来的后移压力、新疆考生规模大幅增 长导致的竞争加剧，以及软科排名持续上升带来的吸引力增强，在2025年基准6065名基础上，扩招效应与考生增长效应相互对冲，预计2026年最低位次约6823名，区间6323-7323 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 7391, in 2024 approximately 6396, and in 2025 approximately 6065. Over the past three years, the ranking has shown a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward movement of about 1326 places from 2023 to 2025. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 6065. The university's science enrollment plan in Xinjiang was 12 students in 2023, reduced to 10 in 2024, and maintained at 10 in 2025. The 2026 plan is to restore to 12 students, an increase of 2 students (20% growth) compared to 2025. This expansion will increase enrollment slots, exerting some backward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 113th in 2021, 107th in 2023, 103rd in 2025, and 97th in 2026. This steady improvement reflects the university's enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. In 2022, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to a controversy involving the former secretary), but no major negative public opinion has occurred since. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd, with an evaluation of 'average,' indicating moderate exposure on short video platforms without significant abnormal popularity. No records of admission line drops have been observed. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A-class discipline at the university, giving it a strong disciplinary advantage in the chemical engineering field and attracting candidates interested in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are socially popular to highly recommended, aligning with Taiyuan University of Technology's engineering orientation. In 2025, the number of science candidates in Xinjiang is approximately 52,538, and the total number of candidates in 2026 is about 238,000. Estimating the 2026 science candidate proportion at about 68.6% (based on 2025), the number of science candidates in 2026 is approximately 163,268, a significant increase of about 2.1 times compared to 2025, leading to intensified competition. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan City, Shanxi Province, and recruits across provinces in Xinjiang, with no local student preference. The university's science enrollment scale in Xinjiang is small (10-12 students), making ranking fluctuations sensitive to enrollment number changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the backward pressure from the 20% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to the significant increase in the number of candidates in Xinjiang, and the enhanced attractiveness from the steady rise in Soft Science rankings, based on the 2025 baseline of 6065, the expansion effect and candidate growth effect offset each other. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 6823, with a range of 6323 to 7323.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Mechanical and Electronic Engineering
- Materials Forming and Control Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Resource Exploration Engineering
- Mining Engineering (new enrollment major in 2026)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 6323-7323, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 6323), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Mechanical and Electronic Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 7300), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
